transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Namaste, Priya bol rahi hoon Supreme Petrochemicals Chennai se.

transcript.speaker: lead
transcript.text: Hum perfume banate hain. Main owner hoon

transcript.speaker: lead
transcript.text: Bilkul, ethanol aur fragrance carriers. Lekin volumes chote hain, 200 kg mahine

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hum chote volumes bhi serve karte hain. Quote bhejun?

transcript.speaker: lead
transcript.text: Pehle WhatsApp pe details bhej do, dekhenge
